entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00183) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSAL (ECP) E0PC007-112R1 GEN IV M20 ANTENNA INTO THE BASIC CONTRACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00185) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO INCORPORATE ECP E0PC007-120 ONTO CONTRACT W15P7T-10-D-C007

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00186) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO REVISE PRICING PLACED ON CONTRACT VIA P00161 AS A RESULT OF THE DEFINITIZATION OF ECP E0PC007-108 "THEMIS HD END-OF-LIFE (EOL)". ERRONEOUSLY, NEGOTIATED PRICING WAS PLACED ON P00161 INSTEAD OF FINAL SWEEP/CERT PRICING. THIS MODIFICATION REPLACED NEGOTIATED PRICING WITH THE FINAL SWEEP/CERT PRICING. CHANGE IS MADE AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00187) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCORPORATE ECP# E0PC007-125, ENTITLED REPLACE THE BROCADE USER ACCESS CASE (UAC) WITH THE WIN-T UAC

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00188) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS ACTION IS TO AWARD A BASE CONTRACT MODIFICATION (P00188) THAT WILL PLACE AN ADDITIONAL THREE (3) YEARS OF RANGE PRICING ON CONTRACT FOR THE WIN-T INCREMENT 2 CONFIGURATION ITEMS (CIS).

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00189) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION (P00189) UNDER THE BASIC CONTRACT W15P7T-10-D-C007 IS TO INCORPORATE THE RANGE PRICING FOR THE REPLENISHMENT SPARES FOR YEAR TWO(2)AND YEAR THREE(3).

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00191) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION (P00191) TO THE BASIC CONTRACT W15P7T-10-D-C-007 IS TO INCORPORATE AN ADMINISTRATIVE ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSAL (ECP) EOPC007-121 ENTITLED MERCURY (THEMIS) HD FM.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00192) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00192 IS TO INCORPORATE THE NEGOTIATED PRICING FOR THE MATV CABLE KITS BASED ON THE DEFINITIZATION OF THE COST PROPOSAL.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T10DC007 (P00193) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS MISSION SYSTEMS, INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00193 UNDER THE BASIC CONTACT ISSUED IN ACCORDANCE WITH FAR 52.243-1, CHANGES FIXED-PRICE TO INCORPORATE THE MTK ENGINEERING CHANGE PROPOSAL(ECP) EOPC007-153 AND THE MERCURY XR6 ECP-EOPC007-154R1.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
